title: Communications Discipline
summary: Maintaining clear and efficient communications during combat.
details: Combat comms must be: brief, clear, and relevant. Use callsigns not names. Report: contacts, kills, damage taken, ammunition state. Avoid chatter - it blocks critical messages. Standard format: 'Callsign, message.' Acknowledge orders briefly: 'Alpha, copies.' When receiving fire, call it: 'Beta taking fire, bearing 270.' Leader summarizes when possible: 'All units, rally point Charlie.'
annotations: Poor comms kills squadrons as surely as enemy fire.
Practice standard callouts until they're automatic.
